This struct is that boundary made data: it records"] # [doc = " the producer and consumer modes and the **floored** guarantee the value is *honestly* allowed to"] # [doc = " claim once it crosses in."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " It is deliberately a *value*, not a panic or a log line: the boundary is surfaced to the caller as"] # [doc = " an inspectable artifact (no black box, G2), the same posture RFC-0012 takes for a paradigm"] # [doc = " crossing (an explicit `swap`, never an inserted conversion)."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , Copy , PartialEq , Eq)] pub struct CrossModeEvent { # [doc = " The mode the incoming value was produced under."] pub producer : CertMode , # [doc = " The mode the consuming computation runs under."] pub consumer : CertMode , # [doc = " The guarantee strength the value carried before crossing."] pub incoming : GuaranteeStrength , # [doc = " The guarantee strength the value is honestly allowed to claim **after** crossing ŌĆö floored by"] # [doc = " the *producer's* mode, never upgraded to the consumer's (VR-5).
